# Turn on language selection for agents (Public Beta)

> \[!IMPORTANT]
>
> Localization is currently available as a Public Beta product and the information contained in this document is subject to change. Some features are not yet implemented and others may be changed before the product is declared as Generally Available. Public Beta products are not covered by a SLA.

## Overview

Turn on language selection to give agents the option to set their Flex UI display language. When you turn on this setting, agents have a [**Select language**](/docs/flex/end-user-guide/change-display-language) option under their user profile.

## What text is localized?

* This setting affects the display language for the base Flex UI and [Twilio Flex plugins](https://flex-plugins-library.twilio.com/).
* It doesn't affect Twilio Console or the Flex Admin dashboard.
* Custom plugins can be localized with additional configuration. See [Localize a plugin](/docs/flex/developer/plugins/localize-a-plugin) for instructions to render plugin text in a different language.

## Turn on language selection

1. From the Flex [**Admin** dashboard](https://flex.twilio.com/admin), click **Features** and then click the **Beta** tab.
2. Turn on **Language selection**.
